retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and always executes; retrying would cause a double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper that decrements the reference count of a btrfs_delayed_node. If the refcount reaches zero, the node is removed from the radix tree and freed. Before the decrement, the function handles node queueing/dequeuing based on its count and frees the associated ref tracker. The caller must have a valid reference and must not use the node after calling this function, as it may be freed. All clean-up actions are performed within a single call, making it a comprehensive release helper.
